java.util.stream/Stream/filter.name: filter
signatures: public Stream<T> filter(Predicate<? super T> predicate)
java.util.stream/Stream/filter.description:
Returns a stream consisting of the elements of this stream that match
the given predicate.

java.util.stream/Collectors/filtering.name: filtering
signatures: public static<T, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R> filtering(Predicate<? super T> predicate, Collector<? super T, A, R> downstream)
java.util.stream/Collectors/filtering.description:
Adapts aCollectorto one accepting elements of the same typeTby applying the predicate to each input element and only
accumulating if the predicate returnstrue.

info.excerpt:
Adapts aCollectorto one accepting elements of the same typeTby applying the predicate to each input element and only
accumulating if the predicate returnstrue.

java.util.stream/Collector/finisher.name: finisher
java.util.stream/Collector/finisher.description: Perform the final transformation from the intermediate accumulation typeAto the final result typeR.

info.excerpt: Perform the final transformation from the intermediate accumulation typeAto the final result typeR.

java.util.stream/Gatherer/finisher.name: finisher
signatures: public default BiConsumer<A, Gatherer.Downstream<? super R>> finisher()
java.util.stream/Gatherer/finisher.description:
A function which accepts the final intermediate state
and aGatherer.Downstreamobject, allowing to perform a final action at
the end of input elements.

info.excerpt:

and aGatherer.Downstreamobject, allowing to perform a final action at
the end of input elements.

java.util.stream/Stream/flatMap.name: flatMap
signatures: public <R> Stream<R> flatMap(Function<? super T, ? extends Stream<? extends R>> mapper)
java.util.stream/Stream/flatMap.description:
Returns a stream consisting of the results of replacing each element of
this stream with the contents of a mapped stream produced by applying
the provided mapping function to each element.

info.excerpt:
Returns a stream consisting of the results of replacing each element of
this stream with the contents of a mapped stream produced by applying
the provided mapping function to each element.

java.util.stream/Collectors/flatMapping.name: flatMapping
signatures: public static<T, U, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R> flatMapping(Function<? super T, ? extends Stream<? extends U>> mapper, Collector<? super U, A, R> downstream)
java.util.stream/Collectors/flatMapping.return_type: static<T, U, A, R> Collector<T, ?, R>
java.util.stream/Collectors/flatMapping.description:
Adapts aCollectoraccepting elements of typeUto one
accepting elements of typeTby applying a flat mapping function
to each input element before accumulation.

info.excerpt:
Adapts aCollectoraccepting elements of typeUto one
accepting elements of typeTby applying a flat mapping function
to each input element before accumulation.

java.util.stream/Gatherers/fold.name: fold
signatures: public static<T, R> Gatherer<T, ?, R> fold(Supplier<R> initial, BiFunction<? super R, ? super T, ? extends R> folder)
java.util.stream/Gatherers/fold.description:
Returns a Gatherer that performs an ordered,reduction-like,
transformation for scenarios where no combiner-function can be
implemented, or for reductions which are intrinsically
order-dependent.

info.excerpt:
Returns a Gatherer that performs an ordered,reduction-like,
transformation for scenarios where no combiner-function can be
implemented, or for reductions which are intrinsically
order-dependent.

java.util.stream/IntStream/forEachOrdere.name: forEachOrdered
java.util.stream/IntStream/forEachOrdere.description:

defined encounter order.
